sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: FC Augsburg have struggled recently, losing 3 of their last 5 matches and failing to win in their last 4. 1. FC Union Berlin are also in poor form, winless in their last 5 matches with a mix of draws and losses. Both teams have been unable to keep clean sheets, with Augsburg conceding in their last 3 and Union Berlin in their last 4.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, FC Augsburg have dominated with 2-0 victories in both encounters. They have a strong record against Union Berlin, remaining unbeaten in the last 4 meetings, often scoring first.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Augsburg (11th, 43 points) have scored 34 goals but struggle with possession (43.4%, 16th in league). Union Berlin (13th, 37 points) have a slightly worse offensive output with 33 goals and also concede frequently (50 goals against). Both teams have similar defensive frailties, suggesting a potentially open game.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Tactics
sections.text: Augsburg’s Alexis Claude-Maurice (9 goals, 7.16 rating) could exploit Union Berlin’s leaky defense. Union Berlin’s Benedict Hollerbach (8 goals) is a threat, but their missing players might impact creativity. Augsburg’s home advantage at WWK ARENA may play a role.
